channel.title: RyanX Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on AI, development, and sharp thinking.

item.title: Building AI Agents That Actually Ship
item.description: Most AI agents are demos. Here is what separates a prototype from production-ready autonomous systems.

item.title: Building in Public: Why Transparency Wins
item.description: Sharing your process is not oversharing. It is the most powerful marketing tool you are not using.

item.title: The ENTP Developer: Chaos as a Superpower
item.description: Being an ENTP in tech is both a blessing and a curse. Here is how to harness the chaos.

item.title: First Principles Thinking for Developers
item.description: Stop copying solutions. Start understanding problems. A framework for thinking like a senior engineer.

item.title: Why Static Sites Won (And Why You Should Care)
item.description: The web went full circle. Static is the new dynamic, and your blog does not need a database.
